title: Q1 retrigger logic
prompt:
Open tests/run-headless.js and find the VOICEMANAGER ghost-note invariants test block (it uses const A = P.Audio and the helper ok(condition, message)). Add TWO new assertions to that block. To keep the count predictable, FIRST call A.allNotesOff(true) to reset, then:
1. After A.noteOn(60,0.8,'q') followed by A.noteOn(62,0.8,'q') (the SAME key 'q' pressed twice), assert A.liveCount() equals 1 (the re-press must replace the prior voice, not orphan it).
2. Then after A.noteOff('q'), assert A.liveCount() equals 0.
Use the existing ok(condition, message) helper. Edit ONLY tests/run-headless.js. Do not create, import, or add any other files.
